title: Query and reconcile ledger actuals
preconditions: The local Ledger is readable; filter semantics and date/sign conventions are discoverable.
postconditions: Repeated equivalent queries over unchanged state return identical membership, ordering, Net Account Movement, External Spend, and Budget Actual values; every page retains first-page membership and full-set aggregates; empty results are explicit successes with zero named aggregates.
main_flow: 1. The agent submits explicit filters and output contract version. 2. Tally validates the filter combination. 3. Tally selects Canonical Transactions using Effective Date, category-allocation, transfer, refund/reversal, and correction rules. 4. Tally establishes one immutable snapshot containing membership plus separately named Net Account Movement, External Spend, and Budget Actual aggregates, then returns the first page and snapshot-bound cursor when needed. 5. Later pages read the same snapshot even if new writes occur; an unavailable snapshot fails explicitly. 6. The agent reconciles Net Account Movement to the exact signed sum and reconciles External Spend and Budget Actual to their transfer/refund-aware net-spend formulas. 7. BUDGET and INSIGHTS consume the public results rather than duplicate these rules.
alt_flows: 2a. Date range, account, category, relationship, or lifecycle filter is invalid -> reject with structured errors
3a. The store fails integrity validation -> fail rather than report any aggregate
4a. Results exceed one response -> return a snapshot-bound deterministic cursor and unchanged full-set aggregates
5a. The snapshot is expired or unavailable -> fail explicitly; never continue against live membership
6a. Any named aggregate differs from its exact defined formula over the snapshot membership -> treat as an integrity failure
metadata: {"depth_tier":3,"primary_actor":"P1","trigger":"The owner needs trustworthy transactions or actual totals for a period, account, category, transfer state, or categorization state.","status":"draft"}
